source_documents.title: Apple Inc. Form 10-Q for the quarter ended March 28, 2026

source_authenticity.evidence: Both documents were acquired from allowed official domains and checksum-bound locally.

primary_source.evidence: The metric facts are direct statements in the issuer earnings release.

identity_crosscheck.evidence: The associated regulatory filing cross-checks issuer identity and filing period.

ticker_instrument_company_mapping.evidence: The approved ticker matches its canonical equity instrument and company identity.

metric_lineage.evidence: Revenue and diluted EPS growth are directly stated percentages; no metric was derived.

fiscal_context.evidence: FY2026 Q2 is cross-checked against the associated Form 10-Q.

unit_scale.evidence: Both source values are percentages and DATA08 defers ratio normalization to DATA07.

freshness.evidence: The latest fully closed and officially reported issuer quarter was used.

publication_boundary.evidence: Official URLs, checksums, compact facts and audit metadata may be committed; full source documents remain local and uncommitted.

remaining_limitations: This approval applies only to the exact approved ticker and checksum-bound package.
The package is partial and does not establish complete fundamental coverage.
